text.title: embedding-cost-optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embedding-cost-optimization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating TF-IDF near-duplicate removal as semantic deduplication.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: TF-IDF operates on surface token overlap. Two texts expressing the same fact with different vocabulary score low similarity. Semantic dedup requires embedding the texts first — the opposite of what you want for cost reduction.
